blockingIssues.description: Business-entity skipping in scrapers/voter_lookup.py reuses substring-based is_business_entity, which false-positives legitimate person names containing INC/CORP substrings (for example, VINCENT and LINCOLN), causing valid leads to be skipped from voter enrichment.
Lint validator failed: npm run lint exits with code 127 because eslint is not available/configured in this repository state.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit handoff rule that Known Pre-Existing Issues must never be listed under discoveredIssues in worker handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-pa-enrichment-setdefault and configurable-outreach-phone handoffs reported pre-existing warnings (Vite chunk-size and pip conflicts) as discovered issues despite AGENTS.md guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow a targeted RED-test-first workflow before full-suite execution, and allow deterministic pure-function changes to skip ad-hoc manual checks when covered by focused unit tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-pa-enrichment-setdefault and configurable-outreach-phone both reported procedural deviations despite strong deterministic unit-test coverage and successful full validation runs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an acceptable fallback verification path (component-level mount/controlled state) when normal UI navigation cannot open a drawer because data is empty locally.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-readonly-prop-threading had empty Cases data and validated CaseDrawer by direct mount, but this fallback is not explicitly described in the current react-frontend skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention for owner-name classification: business-entity detection in voter/person pipelines should use token or word-boundary matching, not broad substring matching.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: voter-pipeline-infrastructure reused substring-based entity detection and introduced a blocking false-positive bug for legitimate personal names.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate report that pre-existing warning lines were logged as discovered issues
voter_lookup module messaging still says CSV in some strings despite TSV support
rejectedObservations.reason: belongs to direct code fix in a feature, not a shared-state guidance update
